name: joltik
flavor_texts: Joltik that live in cities have learned a technique for sucking electricity from the outlets in houses.
They attach themselves to large-bodied Pokémon and absorb static electricity, which they store in an electric pouch.
Since it can’t generate its own electricity, it sticks onto large-bodied Pokémon and absorbs static electricity.
Joltik can be found clinging to other Pokémon. It’s soaking up static electricity because it can’t produce a charge on its own.
Joltik latch on to other Pokémon and suck out static electricity. They’re often found sticking to Yamper’s hindquarters.
text: Joltik is the Attaching Pokémon. It is a bug and electric-type Pokémon. Abilities: compound-eyes, unnerve, swarm (hidden). Base stats — HP: 50, Attack: 47, Defense: 50, Sp. Atk: 57, Sp. Def: 50, Speed: 65. Evolution line: joltik → galvantula. Lore: Joltik that live in cities have learned a technique for sucking electricity from the outlets in houses. They attach themselves to large-bodied Pokémon and absorb static electricity, which they store in an electric pouch. Since it can’t generate its own electricity, it sticks onto large-bodied Pokémon and absorbs static electricity. Joltik can be found clinging to other Pokémon. It’s soaking up static electricity because it can’t produce a charge on its own. Joltik latch on to other Pokémon and suck out static electricity. They’re often found sticking to Yamper’s hindquarters.
